intro: Every room tells a story — craft your perfect retro vibe.
description:
Retro Motel Simulator invites you on a nostalgic journey to the golden age of roadside America. Step into the sizzling 1960s and build your own dream motel — a place where pastel walls, chrome furniture, and glowing neon signs tell stories of freedom, style, and ambition.

Start small on a dusty desert highway and work your way up to a five-star retro paradise. Repaint faded walls, decorate rooms with authentic mid-century charm, and make every guest feel at home under the warm buzz of neon lights. From hands-on cleaning and maintenance to full creative control over décor and pricing, every decision shapes your success.

Wander freely in first-person through vintage halls, listen to the hum of jukebox tunes, and watch your guests unwind, dance, and live out their 60s dreams. Feel every brushstroke, sweep, and hammer strike through immersive controller feedback that brings your motel to life.

Key Features:
• Authentic 1960s Atmosphere: Experience the warmth, charm, and style of mid-century America with stunning period décor and lighting.
• Creative Freedom: Design and personalize every room — choose colors, furniture, and decorations to craft the perfect vintage vibe.
• Guest Management: Rent out rooms, set prices, and keep your guests satisfied to boost reputation and profits.
• Hands-On Gameplay: Clean, repair, and maintain your motel to keep ratings high and customers coming back.
• Dynamic Progression: Expand your property, unlock new design options, and turn your roadside stop into a legendary landmark.
• Live 60s Orchestra: Watch your guests dance the night away to live performances of classic tunes.
• Immersive Feedback: Feel every action — from sweeping floors to tuning lamps — with realistic vibration responses.

Welcome to the era where hospitality met style — your Retro Motel is open for business.
